A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent identified "food" papers by regex-matching the word "food" in the full paper text from Mongo (call_GMWTvBdbOFNYGD1EYOpEH3e9) rather than extracting and filtering by the domain metadata, then summed citations for those titles in SQLite (call_lNHvNeWNvEqcRyjwzlWaqXXp), leading to an overinclusive total of 14704 instead of the ground-truth 11203.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
